query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Horizontal streaks of color blending lavender at the top into layers of turquoise, teal, and green below, with soft transitions between zones and no discernible subjects or objects.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred abstract image where horizontal streaks of lavender, turquoise, teal, and green dissolve into soft color fields with no recognizable content, rendering it as pure color and gesture rather than representation.
